decision.reason: treatment beat control by 360.0 point(s) with no hard constraint failures

provenBehavior: The deterministic harness runs the same fixture with semantic evidence hidden from the control state and visible in the treatment state.
The control run exposes no semantic-neighbor links and produces no finding.
The treatment run exposes semantic-neighbor links and produces a traced Refactoring Finding.
Treatment fixtures can run fix and revalidate through the normal CLI while rejecting test mutation.
Constraint fixtures run sealed behavior invariants before measuring future-change cost.
Fixture definitions must declare a change scenario, current cost, target cost, and validation command before a positive ROI score can count.
Fixture evaluator files are hash-checked inside copied worktrees, so fix and future-change steps cannot mutate tests, behavior scripts, or project test config.
Future-change probes measure whether treatment reduces touch points versus control.
Future-change probes define the change scenario, current cost, target cost, and cost dimensions before scoring easier change.
Production readiness requires multiple positive future-change scenarios plus a semantic false-positive trap.
The run records hard constraint failures separately from quality metrics.
outOfScope: Live-provider ROI remains out of scope for this deterministic command.
nextInputs: Use this deterministic gate for production mapper/refactoring ROI changes; add new sealed scenarios as new refactoring classes become supported.

results.name: Pricing rule locality ROI
results.description: Control/treatment ROI fixture proving semantic evidence promotes a duplicated pricing policy refactor and future member discount changes become local.

constraint.description: Changing the member discount rule requires edits in checkout and subscription pricing slices.

expectedTransformation.description: Extract duplicated member discount calculation into one shared pricing policy module.

futureChangeProbe.name: change member discount rate
futureChangeProbe.description: A representative future change should update both checkout and subscription member discounts with fewer touch points after the shared policy exists.

validation.name: pricing outputs use updated member discount rate

items.title: Shared member discount policy can be extracted
Shared member discount policy can be extracted

revalidate.reasoning: mock pricing refactor moved the member discount rule to a shared policy module

futureChangeProbe.name: change member discount rate
futureChangeProbe.description: A representative future change should update both checkout and subscription member discounts with fewer touch points after the shared policy exists.

validation.name: pricing outputs use updated member discount rate

scenario.scenario: Change the member discount rate used by checkout and subscription pricing.
scenario.whyThisMeasuresEasier: The same conceptual pricing rule change should cross fewer pricing slices after the refactor because the discount decision has one policy module.
easierWhen: treatment touches fewer files for the same conceptual member-discount change
treatment localizes the change to the shared pricing policy

results.name: Semantic evidence review ROI
results.description: Control/treatment ROI fixture proving semantic evidence promotes a sibling formatter refactoring candidate without producing the finding when semantic evidence is disabled.

constraint.description: Changing formatter money display rules requires edits in checkout and invoice formatter slices.

expectedTransformation.description: Extract duplicated money formatting into one shared formatter helper.

futureChangeProbe.name: change money display prefix
futureChangeProbe.description: A representative future change should update both checkout and invoice money output with fewer touch points after the shared formatter exists.

items.title: Sibling duplicate helper can be unified
Sibling duplicate helper can be unified

revalidate.reasoning: mock semantic refactor moved both formatter slices to the shared money formatter

futureChangeProbe.name: change money display prefix
futureChangeProbe.description: A representative future change should update both checkout and invoice money output with fewer touch points after the shared formatter exists.

scenario.scenario: Change the money display prefix for every formatter that renders invoice totals.
scenario.whyThisMeasuresEasier: The same conceptual rule change should cross fewer formatter slices after the refactor because the money-formatting decision has one home.
easierWhen: treatment touches fewer files for the same conceptual money-formatting change
treatment localizes the change to the shared money formatter

results.name: Semantic evidence false-positive trap
results.description: Control/treatment ROI fixture proving semantic-neighbor links do not create a finding without local refactoring evidence.
